rationale: Holding the arrival's afterglow: I'll let the bloom sustain and place a slow ripple expanding on dark water — the moonlight gesture transformed into its echo, breathing with the phrase rather than punctuating it.

input.svg_markup: <svg viewBox="-500 -200 1000 400" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><radialGradient id="rip" cx="0.5" cy="0.5" r="0.5"><stop offset="0" stop-color="#f5e6c8" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="0.7" stop-color="#e8d4a0" stop-opacity="0.35"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#2a1f14" stop-opacity="0"/></radialGradient></defs><ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="420" ry="40" fill="none" stroke="#f5e6c8" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0.55"/><ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="300" ry="28" fill="none" stroke="#e8d4a0" stroke-width="1.6" opacity="0.7"/><ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="180" ry="16" fill="none" stroke="#f5e6c8" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.85"/><ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="80" ry="7" fill="none" stroke="#f5e6c8" stroke-width="2.4" opacity="0.95"><animate attributeName="rx" values="60;120;60" dur="9s" repeatCount="indefinite"/><animate attributeName="opacity" values="0.95;0.55;0.95" dur="9s" repeatCount="indefinite"/></ellipse><ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="600" ry="55" fill="url(#rip)" opacity="0.6"/></svg>
input.semantic_label: slow ripple expanding on dark water
